scenario: Switching to Blueprint Architect changes left sidebar
expected_result: Left sidebar content changes — Project Navigator / Filters / System Tools accordion is GONE. Blueprint sidebar appears: Master Manifest selector + External Exchange (upload/download).

scenario: Switching back to Home restores Home sidebar
expected_result: Home sidebar (Project Navigator / Filters / System Tools accordion) reappears. No DOM artefacts from Blueprint mode.

scenario: Master Manifest selector shows available manifests
action: Look at the 'Master Manifest' panel — 'stored_manifest_selector' dropdown
expected_result: Dropdown is populated with available project manifests (not 'Scanning config/…' placeholder). Selecting one updates the TubeMap.

precondition: Blueprint Architect mode; a manifest selected in the dropdown
action: Wait for the TubeMap to render
expected_result: TubeMap (DAG / pipeline diagram) is visible in the center header area. Nodes correspond to pipeline steps in the manifest.

action: Click the collapse control on the TubeMap panel
expected_result: TubeMap collapses to save vertical space. Collapse state persists when switching back from another tab.

scenario: Central body shows live plot for selected node
precondition: Blueprint Architect mode; TubeMap rendered; click a leaf (plot) node in the TubeMap
expected_result: Live plot renders in the central body area (below TubeMap). Plot matches the selected node's spec.

scenario: Data Glimpse table shown below plot
precondition: Blueprint Architect mode; a node selected; plot rendered
expected_result: Data preview table ('Live Data Glimpse') is visible. Shows a sample of the data for the selected node.

scenario: Right sidebar shows selected node's logic
precondition: Blueprint Architect mode; a node selected in TubeMap
expected_result: Right sidebar shows transformation steps for the SELECTED node — not all nodes. Header identifies the selected component.

precondition: Blueprint Architect mode; a valid YAML manifest file prepared
action: Click 'Select YAML…' in External Exchange; choose the file; click '📥 Upload (Replace)'
expected_result: 'TubeMap updates to reflect the uploaded manifest. No error notification.

precondition: Blueprint Architect mode; a manifest loaded
expected_result: A .yaml file downloads. Its contents match the current active manifest.

scenario: Blueprint Architect NOT accessible for pipeline-static
action: Look at the nav pills — verify Blueprint Architect is absent
expected_result: Blueprint Architect nav pill is NOT visible. There is no way to enter this mode.
